subcodes.first_line: ...As to the question ye have asked me, know verily that this is a well-guarded secret. It is even as a gem concealed within its shell.
subcodes.first_line_orig: اما عن السئوال الذی سالتموه فاعلموا بان هذا سر مکنون و انه کالجوهرة المخفیه فی صدفتها
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @predictions and prophecies
